untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-leg volatility strategy analysis across different expirations with term structure comparisons (implied vs. historical volatility across tenors). The allowed indicators do not include: (1) implied volatility (IV) by expiration tenor, (2) historical volatility by expiration tenor, (3) term structure spread calculations, (4) multi-leg position construction/evaluation, or (5) volatility term structure curve analysis. This is a derivatives volatility strategy that cannot be expressed using equity price-based technical indicators alone. The signal fundamentally requires options market data (IV curves, skew, term structure) which is outside the scope of the provided indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal ID NATENBERG_DRY_134_0 references Natenberg's volatility framework requiring comparative analysis of implied vs. historical volatility across short-term (42 DTE) and long-term (95 DTE) expirations. Available indicators (hvol_20, india_vix) are insufficient for this multi-expiration, multi-tenor term structure analysis. Would require custom indicators: iv_short_term, iv_long_term, hv_short_term, hv_long_term, term_structure_slope.
